title: rubus × subtilissimus
intro: Rubus × subtilissimus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus × subtilissimus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and may even help to reduce the risk of certain cancers. Rubus × subtilissimus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
